mentions.note: Good company but timing is wrong; wait until after SpaceX IPO pricing before buying to allow more informed decision.
Good situation fundamentally; won't be bad if you own it. But avoid buying before SpaceX deal prices; too much capital in motion. Wait for post-deal clarity.
Large banks showing real resilience despite year of underperformance; broad financial sector recovery hint ahead of employment data.
Best bank in world trading 13x earnings (below market average); balanced growth, fortress franchise, down 7% YTD. Buy and hold.
